methodology.notes: Evaluated using AllTools retrieval (BM25 + dense OpenAI text-embedding-3-large + sandboxed shell). User simulator: gpt-5.2 with reasoning_effort: low. 4 trials. Seed: 300. Banking_knowledge domain only — other domains intentionally excluded from this comparison; the AllTools setting standardizes retrieval across models.

verification.details: Banking_knowledge domain only, AllTools retrieval. Trajectories suppressed for this preliminary AllTools comparison; raw per-task results retained internally.

model_release.announcement_title: Gemini 3.1 Pro: A smarter model for your most complex tasks
